title: Alexitoxicon acuminatum
intro:
I couldn't find any information on the plant Alexitoxicon acuminatum. However, I found information on the plant Aconitum, also known as Aconitum acuminatum, which is a species of flowering plant in the Aconitum genus. 

Aconitum is a type of perennial plant that contains a number of bioactive constituents, including alkaloids such as aconitine, aconitine, mesaconitine, and hypaconitine. The health benefits of Aconitum include its anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat pain and arthritis.
